title: pterostylis clivicola
intro: Pterostylis clivicola is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Western Australia. It is known for its unique greenish-yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Pterostylis clivicola is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage are strictly regulated due to its endangered status.
